title: cleome carnosa
intro: Cleome carnosa, also known as the pink spider flower or cleome, is a flowering plant native to South Africa, belonging to the Cleomaceae family. The plant has been traditionally used in folk medicine for its medicinal properties, including antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Cleome carnosa include its ability to treat skin conditions such as acne, eczema, and wounds, as well as its potential to reduce fever and alleviate respiratory issues. In herbal preparations, Cleome carnosa is often used to make infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, which can be applied topically or consumed orally to harness its medicinal properties.
